level_signals: 8+ years of B2C product management experience
Responsible for mentoring other PMs and raising the bar across the product org
Operates with high ownership and autonomy, influences executive leadership

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 8+ years of B2C product management experience, with a track record of owning large, complex product areas
Demonstrated ability to define and execute product strategy that drives measurable business impact
Strong product sense with the ability to identify high-leverage opportunities and make principled tradeoffs
Experience leading cross-functional teams and influencing stakeholders across multiple organizations
Deep understanding of experimentation, analytics, and data-driven decision making
Ability to operate with high ownership and autonomy in ambiguous, fast-paced environments
Strong communication skills with the ability to influence and align at all levels, including executive leadership

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Fluency with modern AI tools for product development: Ability to leverage tools like Cursor and Claude to accelerate product workflows, prototyping, and execution.

explicitly_excluded: Remote work from Hawaii or Alaska

scope.surface: SoFi Invest — the end-to-end investing experience for members (discovery, engagement, wealth growth)
scope.business_model: B2C fintech / national bank, consumer investing product
core_responsibilities: Define and drive product strategy: Own the long-term vision and strategy for the investing experience
Lead complex, cross-org initiatives: Drive large, multi-quarter initiatives that span multiple teams and product areas
Own end-to-end product outcomes: Deliver measurable impact across key metrics such as funded accounts, net deposits, engagement, retention, and AUM growth
Elevate product quality and differentiation: Set a high bar for user experience
Drive data-informed decision making: Partner with data and research teams to define measurement frameworks
Influence platform and system design: Partner with engineering to shape scalable, extensible systems
Mentor and raise the bar: Act as a thought leader within the product organization, mentoring other PMs

green_flags: Clear ownership domain with defined business metrics (AUM, funded accounts, net deposits, engagement, retention)
Principal-level role with significant scope across the full investing journey
Mentions AI tool fluency (Cursor, Claude) as a valued capability — signals modern product culture
EEO and San Francisco Fair Chance Ordinance language suggests inclusive hiring practices
red_flags: Compensation range not disclosed — JD references it will be listed below but no figures appear in the extracted content
Location type is unclear — body only excludes Hawaii and Alaska for remote work, no specific cities or hybrid policy stated
No explicit mention of investing domain experience as a requirement, which could signal ambiguity around domain depth expectations
